Menu / network.push-notifications

Can Swift packages do push notification delivery?

also known as: apns · push provider · apple push notification service

✓

serves it · confidence 0.75 · as of 6.6.0

  • APNSClient
    Sources/APNS/APNSClient.swift:32
    View the line on GitHub →
    Unconditional decl, no visionOS gap in surface. Note the APNSURLSession sub-module IS visionOS-absent (see notes), but the core client is not.
  • APNSClientProtocol.sendAlertNotification
    Sources/APNSCore/Alert/APNSClient+Alert.swift:27
    View the line on GitHub →
✓

serves it · confidence 0.90 · as of 6.6.0

  • APNSClient
    Sources/APNS/APNSClient.swift:32
    View the line on GitHub →
    Server-side APNs provider built on AsyncHTTPClient/SwiftNIO; no linux gap in surface. Repo ships a Dockerfile and the package is SSWG-graduated.
  • APNSClient.send
    Sources/APNS/APNSClient.swift:133
    View the line on GitHub →

    Sources/APNSCore/Alert/APNSClient+Alert.swift:27
